violations.text: Various foods (turkey sausage, jelly, avocado spread, cream cheeses, chix wraps, mini bagel bites, butter, croissant stuffies and queso cheese) were observed held between 50-60 degrees Fahrenheit in unit overnight. Ambient of sandwich station prep unit was 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. A service order was placed. All other TCS foods that were placed in unit 30 mins prior to inspection were moved to walk-in cooler and other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The sandwich station prep unit was observed in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). PIC instructed to not store TCS foods in unit until service is provided.PIC placed service order during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered/closed at time of inspection. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/closed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of miscellaneous debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
The front hand wash sink was observed being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Both the front and back hand wash sinks were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The following in-use utensils were observed improperly stored: 1) Stirring spoons were stored in stagnant water between uses 2) An ice scoop was observed with the handle in direct contact with ice Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The floor in several areas throughout the working facilities is in poor repair (grout missing between tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and front service area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

The walls in the front service area near the coffee holders and hand sink area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The floors in the back prep area under the oven and prep table have an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
